sample_title: Dual RNA sequencing of the leafcutter ant cuticle
sample_description: Dual RNA sequencing reads from the laterocervical plates of A. echinatior leaf cutter ants to investigate gene expression by the ant host and the Pseudonocardia (bacterial) symbiont. Colonies were associated with Pseudonocardia echinatior (088) or Pseudonocardia octospinosus (1083).
project_name: Dual RNA sequencing of the A. echinatior cuticular microbiome
sequencing_method: Dual RNA sequencing with Illumina NextSeq 500 technology
